title: peltophorum linnaei
intro: Peltophorum linnaei, also known as the Yellow Flame Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and seeds. The health benefits associated with Peltophorum linnaei include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
